markdown:
# Wand of Magic Detection

- **Type**: WD|XDMG
- **Weight**: 1 lb.

This wand has 3 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to cast [[detect_magic Magic]] from it. The wand regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.
